system.description:
Nature must take its course for new life to emerge.

LEVEL 3

Controlled Burn. Your attunement to the cycles of nature grants you knowledge of Fire spells. After upcasting a spell or critting in beastform, you may inflict Smoldering on any creature within Range 6.

LEVEL 7

Flash Fire. Inflict Smoldering when you crit with a Lightning spell.

Fan the Flames. Your Wind spells have advantage against Smoldering creatures.

LEVEL 11

Wildfire. Action: Deal LVL+WIL Fire damage to all enemies within Range 6 with Smoldering, ending the condition.

LEVEL 15

From the Ashes. (1/Safe Rest) Action (while Dying): Expend all remaining Hit Dice. You heal for the amount rolled, and deal that much Fire damage to all enemies within Reach 2.
